required_checks: Node v274 disabled candidate upstream echo verification is ready and read-only
The six approval-required boundaries remain approval-required
CREDENTIAL_HANDLE never becomes credential value access
ENDPOINT_HANDLE never becomes raw endpoint URL parsing
OPERATOR_APPROVAL never becomes automatic approval or upstream auto-start
ROLLBACK_BOUNDARY never becomes rollback or production deployment execution
SCHEMA_MIGRATION_POLICY never becomes SQL or schema migration execution
AUDIT_LEDGER_WRITE_POLICY never becomes approval ledger, managed audit, or storage write
mini-kv does not implement or invoke a credential resolver
mini-kv does not instantiate a resolver client or secret provider
mini-kv does not read, load, store, or include credential values
mini-kv does not parse or include raw endpoint URLs
mini-kv does not send external requests or connect managed audit
mini-kv does not write storage, approval ledger records, managed audit state, or production records
mini-kv does not execute schema migration or LOAD/COMPACT/RESTORE/SETNXEX
mini-kv remains runtime evidence only and not a managed audit storage backend or order authority
